data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the internal recognition that the same person booked elsewhere through Bizing. However, the evidence provided does not include concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for internal recognition but lacks direct evidence of its implementation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming internal recognition of the same person booking elsewhere through Bizing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
